calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert C. Ward, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CA-Mission Street Limited Partnership, a Delaware Limited Partnership.
Ann Montilla, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Wildman & Morris, inc., a California corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on March 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff CA-Mission Street, Limited Partnership, a Delaware Limited Partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendant Wildman & Morris, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $11,005.38.
Attorney's Fees - $1,074.00.
Costs - $594.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $12,673.38.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Continued To Jun-25-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
